mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_env_monitoring WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_env_monitoring WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_env_monitoring WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_env_monitoring WHERE monitor_id = #{monitorId} AND deleted = 0

SELECT * FROM tb_env_monitoring WHERE deleted = 0 AND (parameter_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR location LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR measurer_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR monitor_id LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%') ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_env_monitoring WHERE deleted = 0 AND (parameter_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR location LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR measurer_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR monitor_id LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%')
SELECT * FROM tb_env_monitoring WHERE monitor_type = #{monitorType} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_env_monitoring WHERE monitor_type = #{monitorType} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_env_monitoring WHERE status = #{status} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_env_monitoring WHERE status = #{status} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_env_monitoring WHERE status = #{status} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_env_monitoring WHERE monitor_id LIKE #{prefix} + '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_env_monitoring ( monitor_id, monitor_type, status, location, measurement_date, parameter_name, measured_value, unit, standard_value, standard_name, exceed_yn, exceed_rate, measurer_name, measurer_dept, equipment_name, equipment_model, corrective_action, notes, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{monitorId}, #{monitorType}, #{status}, #{location}, #{measurementDate}, #{parameterName}, #{measuredValue}, #{unit}, #{standardValue}, #{standardName}, #{exceedYn}, #{exceedRate}, #{measurerName}, #{measurerDept}, #{equipmentName}, #{equipmentModel}, #{correctiveAction}, #{notes}, #{deleted}, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_env_monitoring SET monitor_type = #{monitorType}, status = #{status}, location = #{location}, measurement_date = #{measurementDate}, parameter_name = #{parameterName}, measured_value = #{measuredValue}, unit = #{unit}, standard_value = #{standardValue}, standard_name = #{standardName}, exceed_yn = #{exceedYn}, exceed_rate = #{exceedRate}, measurer_name = #{measurerName}, measurer_dept = #{measurerDept}, equipment_name = #{equipmentName}, equipment_model = #{equipmentModel}, corrective_action = #{correctiveAction}, notes = #{notes}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_env_monitoring SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
